reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 무색소, 무첨가 좋은제품같아서 처음 구매해봤는데 우리집 귀염둥이가 넘 좋아합니다~~ 평소에 입으로 씹는걸 좋아해서 개껌을 항상 준비해두는데, 이 제품은 오래오래 씹고있어서 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: It looked like a good product with no artificial colors or additives, so I bought it for the first time and my cute pup loves it so much~~ She normally likes to chew on things, so I always keep dog chews on hand, but this product keeps her chewing for such a long time, which is great^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애동카나 식당 데려가서 이거 하나면
댕육아가 편해집니다🥰
reviews.content_en: Whether you take your pup to a pet cafe or restaurant, this one product makes raising a puppy so much easier🥰

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
지속적으로 먹이고 있어요~~
아침 출근시에 주는데 아이들이 먹을 시간만 되면 
알아서 기다려 자세가 되요 ~ㅎㅎ
아직 어려서 1/4만 주고 있는데 그전엔 변이 좋았는데 요즘 물을 잘 안마셔서 변이 조금 그래서 급여량을 좀더 늘려야 겠어요 ~~
끊을수 없는 간식 ㅎㅎㅎ
잘먹이고 다시 주문하러 올께요~~~
reviews.content_en: I've been feeding it to them regularly~~ I give it to them before heading to work in the morning, and when it's snack time, the kids just wait for it on their own~ㅎㅎ Since they're still young, I only give them 1/4, and their poop used to be fine, but lately they're not drinking much water so their poop isn't great, so I think I need to increase the portion~~ An addictive treat ㅎㅎㅎ I'll keep feeding it to them and come back to order again~~~

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 저희 강쥐가 간식을 주면 금방 다 먹어버려서 좀 오래먹을 수 있는 개껌을 찾다가 구매했는데요,,,진짜,,,하루종일 물고 다녀요,,,,완전 질긴 롬이구만유,,,저희 강쥐 입에 들어가면 3초만에 순삭인디,,,햅격입니다!
reviews.content_en: My pup gulps down treats so quickly, so I was looking for a dog chew that lasts longer and bought this,,,but seriously,,,she chews on it all day,,,it's so tough though,,,once my pup gets it in her mouth it's gone in 3 seconds,,,such a fail! 😅

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
소화기가 약한 아이인데
하루 한개씩 급여해도 탈 안나고 변 상태도 괜찮아서
믿고 재주문 합니다~
한 봉지 다 먹었네요
밥 먹을 동안 아주 얌전히 오래 먹어서 좋아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup has a sensitive digestive system, but even giving one a day doesn't cause any issues and her poop looks good, so I trust it and reorder~~ We finished the whole pack and she chews on it for so long and so nicely while we eat, which is great ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해서 다 떨어질 때마다 사는 간식이에요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much that I buy this treat whenever we run out

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
처음로 우리 아로한테 개시한 롤리츄~~!!
아직 3개월꽉채우려면 일주일정도 남았지만 
이갈이시기라 장난감으로는 해소가 안돼는거같아서
구매했어요~~ㅎ
처음보는 장난감이라 생각해서 그런지 어색해 하더니
금방 물고뜯고 사료도 조심스럽게 먹는 편이라 잘먹으려나
걱정했는데 아주 잘근잘근 잘 씹어먹어요
다른 우유껌처럼 딱딱하기만하고 인위적인 향이 나지도 않고
마음에 쏙 들었어요 아로가 다른 강쥐들에 비해 작은편이라
두고두고 잘 먹을거같아요 ~~!
다 떨어지면 또 사주려구요 매우 만족합니다^^
reviews.content_en: Introducing the roll chew to my Aro for the first time~~!! There's about a week left until she's a full 3 months old, but since she's teething and toys don't seem to help, I bought this~~ At first she seemed uncomfortable since it was a toy she'd never seen before, but she quickly started chewing on it, and I was worried if she'd eat it well since she's careful with her food, but she chews and eats it really well. Unlike other milk chews, it's not hard and doesn't have an artificial smell, so I really love it. Since Aro is smaller compared to other puppies, I think she'll enjoy it for a long time~~ When it runs out, I'm planning to buy it again. Very satisfied^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 마누카꿀 이즈 뭔들~ 입맛 까다로운 우리 첫째도 입맛 홀리는 맛인가봐요!😆 얘가 성격이랑 입맛이 진짜 까탈스러워서 간식도 주문해놓고 실패한 게 한두가지가 아닌데 정말 잘 먹어요!☺️ 비싸게 주고 샀는데 안 먹을 땐 너무 속상하고 뜯어서 반품도 못해서 당근해서 나눔한 적도 한 두번이 아니거든요…🥲 근데 이렇게 잘 먹어주는 간식 찾으면 정착할 수 밖에 없어요~🥰 마누카꿀 롤리츄 오래오래 팔아주세요~🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: What even is Manuka honey~~ Even my picky eater seems to have her taste buds enchanted by this flavor!😆 She's really particular about flavors and personality, so I've had more than one or two failed treat orders, but she really eats this well!☺️ I paid a premium for it, and when she doesn't eat something, I feel so upset that I can't even return it after opening, so I've had to give it away a time or two...🥲 But when you find a treat she eats this well, you just have to stick with it~🥰 Please keep selling the Manuka honey roll chew for a long time~🫶🏻

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
까탈쟁이 우리 강아지님께서는 덴탈껌 종류는 안드십니다ㅠ
사정사정하면 먹기는 하는데 간식을.. 굳이.. 사정해서 먹이고 싶지는 않고 주면 환장해야 그게 간식이자나요!? ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 우피껌은 엄청 좋아해요 (그는 고기파!)
고기 붙어있는 중국산 우유껌도 잘먹는데 매일 먹이다 보니 몸에 좋지 않을 것 같아서 바잇미 우피껌으로 정착했습니다!
벌써 세번째 구매에요 ㅎㅎ
매일 먹여도 되나 싶긴한데 사료를 잘안먹어서 저녁 먹으면 보상처럼 줬었는데 이제 습관이 되어서 밥먹고 나서 안주면 아주 온 집안을 샅샅히 뒤지면서 다 어지럽혀놔요 ㅋㅋㅋ
어디 하나 숨겨놓은거 없나 찾나보더라구요 
잘먹어줘서 기특! 가격도 좋아서 너무 만족하는 롤리츄에용❤️
reviews.content_en: My picky pup doesn't eat dental chews😢 She'll eat them if I ask nicely, but I don't want to have to beg her to eat a treat... treats should be something she goes crazy for!? ㅋㅋㅋㅋ But she absolutely loves beef chews (she's a meat lover!) She eats the Chinese-made milk chews with meat on them well, but since I was feeding them to her every day, I didn't think it would be good for her health, so I switched to BITE ME beef chews! This is already my third purchase ㅎㅎ I'm not sure if I should give it to her every day, but she doesn't eat her regular food well, so I started giving it to her as a reward after dinner, and now it's become a habit—if I don't give it to her after meals, she searches the whole house thoroughly and makes a mess everywhere ㅋㅋㅋ I guess she's looking to see if I've hidden one somewhere. I'm proud she eats it so well! The price is also great, so I'm very satisfied with this roll chew❤️

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
포장지도 깔끔하고 지퍼팩 형식이라서 보관도 용이하고 너무 좋아요!! 냄새도 잘 안 나서 집안에서 먹여도 냄새에 예민하신 분들도 편안해하실거 같습니다. 그리고 간식 부스러기 아예 없습니다!! 
무엇보다 아이가 너무 좋아해요ㅎㅎ이갈이 중이라서 더 잘 씹어서 먹습니다!ㅎㅎ기호성이 좋네요~ 오래먹을 수 있는 간식이라서 더 좋습니다! 
간식표지에 하루권장량은 크게 적어두고 먹이고 있습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The packaging is neat and it's in a zipper pack format so it's easy to store and I love it!! The smell is barely noticeable so even people sensitive to smells would be comfortable giving it in the house. And there's not a single crumb of treat!!  Most importantly, my pup loves it so much ㅎㅎ Since she's teething, she chews on it even better ㅎㅎ Good palatability~ It's great because it's a treat she can chew on for a long time! I give it to her according to the daily recommended amount listed clearly on the treat label ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희 6개월 미니비숑 강아지는 2.5키로에요  하나줘놓으니 다먹을때까지계속 물고있네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
물고 있는 모습이 어찌나 귀여운지
형아가 하교해서 집애 들어올때도 이 껌만은 물고 놓지를 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
저희 아이는 다먹는데 한시간쯤 걸린거같아요
덩어리 삼킬까봐 관심돌리려고 일어나서 다른 간식 가지러간 순간 꿀떡 삼키더라구요  아직 강아지라 식탐이 강해서 이점은 유의해야 할거같아요^^
여튼 잘 먹고 오래 먹어요 좋네요
아침에 나가기전에 하나씩 주고 가면 좋을거같아요^^
reviews.content_en: Our 6-month-old mini Bichon is 2.5kg, and once I give him one, he just keeps chewing it until it's all gone hahaha The way he chews is so cute~ Even when his older brother comes home from school, he won't let go of this chew lol It took our pup about an hour to finish one. I was worried he'd swallow a big chunk, so I tried to distract him and went to get another treat, but he gulped it down when I turned around 😅 Since he's still a puppy with a strong appetite, I need to be careful about that^^ Anyway, he eats it well and it lasts a long time, which is great. I think it would be good to give him one before we go out in the morning^^

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
최근 발바닥 사탕질을 해대는 울구름이 위해서 구매했어요~
다이어트 중이라 탄수화물은 안되서
100% 단백질이라서 구매 했어요!

바잇미! 추천!
후기 믿고 구매 했어요!!

꺼내자 마자 자기꺼라는걸 아는 구름이 인증샷~♡


착한가격!!!!! 무조건 쟁이세요!!!!!!!
reviews.content_en: I recently bought this for my Gureume who's been licking his paw pads a lot~ He's on a diet so no carbs for him, and this is 100% protein so I got it! BITE ME! Highly recommend! I bought it based on the reviews and I'm so glad I did!! Gureume knows it's his the moment I take it out - here's his proof pic~♡ Great price!!!!! You gotta get this!!!!!!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
츄* 이라는 우피껌 먹이다가 첨사봤어요
색깔이며 성분이 비슷하네요.
거기는 직사각형으로 납작한 모양인데 이건 둥글고 앏게 되있네요.
소형견이라 먹기엔 크지않고 이게더 나은것 같아요~ 
한개주면 하루종일 생각날때마다 물고뜯고 스트레스 푸는것같아서 요런종류껌 안떨어뜨리는 편인데
저렴이들 잘못사면 표백제나 안전성이 염려되서 신중하게 구매하는데 바잇미 롤리츄는 안심할수 있네요
한팩에 5천원미만이니 가격도 나쁘지 않고
또 이용하겠습니다~^^
reviews.content_en: I used to feed my pup a different woofie chew called Chew*, and this is pretty similar. The color and ingredients are alike. That one is flat and rectangular-shaped, but this one is round and thin. Since my pup is small, it's not too big for him and seems better actually~ When I give him one, he chews on it throughout the day whenever he thinks about it - it seems to relieve his stress. I'm always careful with this type of chew because cheap ones can have bleach or safety concerns, but BITE ME Lollychew is reassuring. It's less than 5,000 won per pack so the price is good too. I'll definitely use this again~^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 냄새 맡자마자 덥썩 물더니 최애 자리 (아빠 이불 위)로 가네요 ㅎㅎ 잘 먹고 좋아합니다~ 유통기한도 내년 11월이라 넉넉해요!^^ 지금 이불 위에서 신나신나 댄스 중입니다~*
reviews.content_en: As soon as he smelled it, he grabbed it and took it to his favorite spot (on Dad's blanket) hehe He eats it well and loves it~ The expiration date is November of next year so that's plenty of time!^^ He's doing a happy dance on the blanket right now~*

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희집 두마리 강아지가 너무 너무 좋아하네요
너무 얇지도 두껍지도 않아서 소형견에게 딱 맞는 사이즈입니다. 오래 씹어서 좋아요 재구매 의사 있습니다^^
reviews.content_en: Both of our dogs love this so much. It's not too thin or too thick - just the right size for small dogs. They can chew on it for a long time which is great. I'm definitely planning to repurchase^^

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 그동안 정말 우피인지 찜찜해서 사본적이 없다가 이걸 사보니 일단 냄새가 사골냄새가 구수하게 났고 우피 그대로의 색인듯하여 맘에 들었어요. 일단 한개만 주문하려는데 3종이 있길래 받자마자 일단 줘보니 천천히 시간들여 어찌나 잘먹는지 정말 뿌듯했어요. 그동안의 일반 개껌은 금방 없어져서 아쉬웠는데 말이죠. 이젠 개껌이나 우피는 여기에서 계속 주문해야되겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: I've been hesitant about buying woofie chews for a while, but when I got this one, the smell was savory like bone broth and the color seemed like real woofie, so I loved it. I only meant to order one but there were 3 types so I gave it to him right away and he ate it so slowly and carefully - I was so proud! Regular dog chews used to disappear too quickly which was disappointing, but now I'll keep ordering dog chews and woofie from here~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
산양유껌은 처음 구매하는데 처음에 낯설어하더니만
자기집에 물고가서 열심히 뜯고있네요
유통기간도 넉넉하고 제조국도 수입아닌 울나라꺼라 더 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's my first time buying a goat milk chew, and at first he was hesitant, but then he took it to his spot and has been chewing on it eagerly. The expiration date is generous and it's made in Korea, not imported, which is even better~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송받자마자 자기껀줄 어떻게 알고 빨리달라고 하더라구요 
입맛 까다로운 저희집 레오 야무지게 꼭 잡고 엄청 오래먹엇어요! 밥먹는동안 한개 줫는데 너무 귀엽게 꼭꼭 씹어 먹었답니다
reviews.content_en: The moment we got the delivery, he somehow knew it was his and asked for it right away! Our picky Leo held onto it and chewed on it for such a long time! I gave him one while we were eating and he chewed it so cutely~

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
밖에 같이 데리고 나갈 일이 많아서 댕댕이도 가방안에서 오래 먹을 간식이 필요했는데 딱이에요 크기도 적당하고 (초소형견이라 항상 덴탈껌제외하고는 급여하기엔 크기가 애매한 것들이 많았음 ㅠ)
강력해요 기호성도 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: I take my pup out a lot, so I needed a treat he could chew on for a long time in the bag, and this is perfect! The size is just right (since he's a tiny breed and most treats besides dental chews are either too big or awkward to give), it's durable, and he really likes it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
울애기 넘 잘먹어요
물고빨다 하얗게 된부분은 가위로 쓱 잘라주면 맛나게 냠냠
야무지게 뜯네요
첨가물이없어 좋아요 재구매 의사 1000프로있습니당
reviews.content_en: My baby eats this so well~ He gnaws and when the white part appears, I just trim it with scissors and he enjoys it even more. He tears into it with gusto~ No additives which is great! I'm 1000% planning to repurchase!!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
국내산 재료라서 처음 구매해 봤어요 
지퍼백이라서 보관하기 좋아요 
냄새는 살짝 고소하네요 
혹시 딱딱하거나 너무 질기려나 싶었는데 
아주 두 손 꼭 잡고 야무지게 먹네요 
맛있는지 처음 먹는데 거부감 없이 십분컷 하네요 ㅋㅋ 
잘 먹는걸 보니 할인 할때 더 사놔야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for the first time because it's made with domestic ingredients. The ziplock bag is great for storage. It has a slightly nutty smell. I was worried it might be hard or too chewy, but my pup holds it firmly in both paws and eats it really well. He ate it without any hesitation on the first try lol. Since he's eating it so well, I should stock up when it goes on sale!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
받자마자 냄새 맡고 달려와서 주니까 잘먹네요!^^ 
다 먹으면 또 주문하려구요~ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: He came running as soon as he smelled it, and he eats it well! ^^ I'll order again once he finishes it ~ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 우피껌 잘 먹는 아이라 좀 두꺼운 다른 브랜드꺼 자주 샀는데 세일하길래 사봤는데 역시나 잘 먹어요..
금방 호로록 씹어 먹긴하지만 그래도 국내산이라 맘에 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: My dog usually eats rawhide chews well, so I used to buy thicker ones from other brands frequently. I tried this one since it was on sale, and sure enough, he loves it too.. He does chew through it pretty quickly, but I'm still happy with it since it's domestically made.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 오래먹이는 간식찾다가 구매해봤어요~ 새가지 맛이라 다양하게 먹일 수 있겠네요!! 껌이 너무 얇아서 소형견에게 좋을 거 같아요ㅠ 저희집 아이는 순삭하네여
reviews.content_en: I bought this looking for a treat that lasts longer~ Since it comes in three different flavors, I can give variety!! The chew is really thin, so it should be great for small dogs ㅠ My pup finishes it in no time though

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
비슷한 우피껌을 다른 브랜드에서 계속 구매했었는데
바잇미 롤리츄가 더 저렴하고 좋네요!

맛도 다양해서 강아지가 엄청 좋아합니다 추천합니다~
reviews.content_en: I used to keep buying similar rawhide chews from other brands, but BITE ME Lolly Chew is cheaper and better! The flavors are diverse too, so my dog absolutely loves it. Highly recommend~

reviews.name: 그****
reviews.content:
솔직히 오래 먹는건 잘 모르겠어요~오래 먹는다는건 그만큼 딱딱하다는건데 다른 오래먹는 제품과 비교하면 덜 딱딱해요
그래서 더 만족합니다.
스트레스 해소용으로 보상용으로 주는데 정신없이 씹어요
성격이 급해 가끔 삼키는 녀석이라 혹시 몰라 다 먹을때 까지 지켜보고 급여합니다
맛나게 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: To be honest, I'm not sure about it lasting long~ Lasting long means it's supposed to be harder, but compared to other long-lasting products, this one is less hard. That's why I'm even more satisfied. I give it as a stress relief treat or reward, and he chews away without stopping. Since he's the impatient type and sometimes swallows without chewing properly, I watch him until he finishes it just in case. He eats it deliciously though!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
처음 구매해본 우피껌 기호성 좋아요! 저희집
댕댕이는 진짜 입이 짧은데 이건 급여 할 때마다 너무 맛있어하며 먹네요! 하나 주면 꽤 오래 씹어서 세일 할 때 사니 가성비도 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: First time buying rawhide chew and the palatability is great! My pup usually has a picky mouth, but he really enjoys this every time I give it to him! He chews on it for quite a while with just one, and since I buy it on sale, the value for money is excellent!

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content:
급하게 먹는 아이인데 요거는 잘씹고 오래먹어서
재구매 했어요 :) 1주일에 한개씩 급여중이에요
기호성도 좋습니다 !
reviews.content_en: My dog usually eats quickly, but with this one he chews well and it lasts longer, so I repurchased it :) I give him one piece per week. The palatability is great too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
요고 하나 주니까 시간 순삭 ! 진작 사줄걸 그랬어요 
35분정도 먹는것 같구 다른맛도 다 먹으면 구매해볼려구요 🫶
reviews.content_en: Give him one of these and it's gone in a flash! I should've bought it sooner. He seems to eat it for about 35 minutes, and once he finishes the other flavors, I'll try those too 🫶

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
제가 먹어볼 수는 없어서 무슨 맛인지 잘 모르지만,,👀
뭉치가 저렇게 집중하는 것을 보니 꿀맛인가봐요ദ്ദി˶ˊᵕˋ˵)

다른 껌들 진짜 5초 컷인데 우피껌은 오래 씹는 편!

제가 맛있는 거 먹을 때 우피껌 손에 쥐어줄 예정임니다🫶
reviews.content_en: I can't taste it myself so I'm not sure what flavor it is,,👀 But seeing Munchi focus like that, it must taste like honey ദ്ദി˶ˊᵕˋ˵) Other chews are really done in 5 seconds, but rawhide chew lasts a long time! I'm planning to give him the rawhide chew in his paws while I eat something tasty 🫶

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 오래 먹을 수 있는 간식찾다 구매했는데 너무 잘 먹어서 하나 더 구매하려구요 !! 가성비 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought this looking for a long-lasting treat, and my pup loves it so much that I'm planning to buy another one!! Great value for money 😊

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
말티푸 5개월 된 아가예요! ㅠㅠ
집에 대부분 혼자 있는 시간이 많아서…
각종 장난감에 노즈워크 덴탈껌까지 해줬는데
계속 맘에 걸리더라고요…ㅠㅠ 잠이 많을 시기라지만
깼을 때 혼자있다는걸 느낄테니 ㅠㅠ
이갈이도 있어서 자꾸 깨물고 그래요! 
오래씹는 껌 급여해도 될 거 같아서 구매했는데
첨엔 킁킁 냄새만 맡더니 한번 핥고, 그러고선 열심히 물어뜯네요 ㅎㅎ 제가 나갔다 다시 바로 들어와도 신경도 안 써요 ㅋㅋ 두 박스 샀는데 기호상 맞아 다행입니당
reviews.content_en:
My Maltipoo is 5 months old! ㅠㅠ
Since she spends most of her time alone at home…
I've given her all sorts of toys, nose work toys, dental chews, but I keep worrying about her… ㅠㅠ I know this is the sleepy phase, but when she wakes up she'll realize she was alone ㅠㅠ
She also has teething, so she keeps chewing on things!
I thought giving her a long-lasting chew would help, so I bought this.
At first she just sniffed it, then licked it once, and now she's chewing away ㅎㅎ Even when I leave and come right back, she doesn't even notice ㅋㅋ I bought two boxes and I'm so glad it matches her taste!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
2.4키로 2키로 두마리포메키우는 보호자에요~
소형견치고 소딱심도 5분컷이라 .. 오래먹을수있는간식을 찾고있었는데 마침우피스틱이 끌려서 😅
혹시하고 구매후 급여해보았는데 한 30분? 정도 씹더라구여~
얌전한시간에 다른걸할수있어서 너무 좋았어요 ☺️
재구매의사있습니다~
reviews.content_en:
I'm a pet parent of two Pomeranians weighing 2.4kg and 2kg~
For small dogs, their attention span is pretty short (like 5 mins max) so… I was looking for long-lasting treats and happened to be drawn to WOOFSTICK 😅
I bought it just to try and gave it to them, and they chewed on it for about 30 minutes?
It was so great to have some quiet time to do other things! ☺️
I'm definitely buying again~

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
두껍지 않아서 작은아이들에게도 먹일 수 있어서 좋아요~
냄새도 없고 기호성도 좋고 나름 선호하는 간식입니다~
단, 다 먹기전에 뺏아서 버려야해요!
마지막에 못 뜯오 먹고 그냥 꿀꺽 삼켜 버려요ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
It's not too thick so even smaller pups can eat it~ It has no smell and good palatability, it's a treat my dogs actually prefer~
However, you have to take it away and throw it out before they finish it!
At the end they can't bite off the last piece and just gulp it down ㅠ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
입맛이 아주 까다로운 2살반 포메 아가를 키우고있는 맘입니다.
별명은 후슐랭!안떨어지게 먹이니 반응이 별로라 1개월 정도 쉬었다 재주문했네요.언박싱하면서부터 흥분하더니,,혼자만의 시간을 갖더라구요ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ많이 웃구요 !!그걸로 만족입니다 !!
reviews.content_en:
I'm a mom raising a 2.5-year-old Pomeranian with very picky eating habits.
Nickname is Hushling! When I feed it without taking breaks, the response isn't great so I took a month off and reordered. He got excited just from unboxing and had some quiet time to himself ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ Very happy!! That's enough for me!! 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 요거 진짜 오래먹어요!! 외출할 때 간식 안주고 나가면 난리나는 갱얼쥐쓰라서 오래먹는 껌 간식은 필수인데여ㅠㅠ 롤리츄 먹으면 시간가는줄 모르고 물고 뜯고 맛보고 즐기고~~~ 이런 오래먹는 껌간식은 대부분 조단백이 80에서 90프로 가까이 되고 매일 먹으면 혹시 건강에 무리갈까 걱정되어서 최대한 낮은 제품 찾아서 구입했는데 잘먹고 잘 놀아서 좋아요!! 크기도 4kg와 5kg 두마리 댕댕에게 모두 적합해서 먹기 좋습니다♥
reviews.content_en: This really lasts a long time!! When I go out without giving treats, my furry little guy goes crazy, so long-lasting chew treats are a must ㅠㅠ With LOLLYCHEW, he loses track of time, chewing and tearing and tasting and enjoying~~~ Most of these long-lasting chew treats have about 80-90% crude protein and I was worried about his health if eaten daily, so I found a product with lower protein, and he eats well and plays well!! The size is also suitable for both my dogs (4kg and 5kg) so it's easy to feed ♥

reviews.name: 세****
reviews.content:
댕댕이가 너무 좋아하는 껌이예요🥺🫳🏻🫳🏻
기다리라고하니 기다리다가 냠냠하는 모습이 너무 귀엽구.. 다양한 맛이랑 무표백제를 사용했다고해서 바잇미 껌으로 먹이고 있어요
reviews.content_en:
My pup absolutely loves this chew! 🥺🫳🏻🫳🏻
When I tell her to wait, she waits and then does this cute nom nom moment.. Since they use various flavors and bleach-free formula, I feed her BITE ME chews~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
4개월 넘어가는 강아지인데, 먹성이 좋아서 말랑한 껌 주면 호다닥 다 먹어버려용
오래 씹을 수 있다길래 구매했는데 정말 오래 물고 뜯어서 좋아요!
너무 크면 반 잘라야겠다 싶었는데 딱 적당한 크기로 되어있어서 하루에 이거 하나면 좋은거같아요!
reviews.content_en:
My dog is over 4 months old and has a good appetite, so when I give soft chews he gobbles them all up quickly
I bought this because it said you could chew on it for a long time, and he really does chew and tear on it for ages!
I thought if it was too big I'd have to cut it in half, but it's just the right size so one of these a day seems perfect!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
3종류에 갯수는 다달라요
6개,7개,9개 들었어요.
굵기도 별차이없던데...
얇아서 엄청 오래먹진않지만
좋아하고 잘먹고 탈없어서
한번씩 구매중입니다.
reviews.content_en:
The count varies by flavor:
6 pieces, 7 pieces, and 9 pieces respectively.
The thickness doesn't vary much…
They're thin so they don't last super long,
but my dog loves them, eats well, and has no issues,
so I keep buying them occasionally.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
2키로 포메라니안 먹이기에 좋아요.
금방 말랑해져서 한입에 넣으려고
하는걸 보고 제가 꽉 잡아주고 먹이고
있어요. 알레르기가 안 올라오길 바래요.
reviews.content_en:
Great for feeding my 2kg Pomeranian.
They soften quickly, so when I see him trying to swallow it in one bite, I hold it tight while feeding.
Hoping no allergies come up.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
정말 오래먹어요
한참동안 먹어서 놀러나갔을때 주기좋아요
막판에 삼키고나서는 좀힘들어해서 저희는 못삼키게하는게 더나을거같아요
reviews.content_en: It lasts really long! It's great to give when we go out for a while. Towards the end after swallowing, my dog had a bit of trouble, so it might be better for us not to let them swallow it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
처음엔 낯설어서 안먹더니 지금은 진짜 너무좋아해욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ묵고있다가 집에 가족들어오면 꼬리만흔들구 뺏을까봐 마중도안나와요… 진심 중독된듯 거의 하루에 한개 꼴로 주는거같은데
이렇게 줘도 괜찮겠죠….? ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ씹다가 쉬고있을때 쳐다보면 또 뺏을까바 급하게 물고 도망치는게 너무 웃겨여 엄청 좋아해요ㅠㅠㅠㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: At first they were hesitant and wouldn't eat it, but now they absolutely love it lol 😂 When they're chewing and my family comes home, they just wag their tail and don't even come greet us because they're worried we'll take it away... They're seriously addicted lol I feel like I'm giving them almost one a day. Is it okay to give them that often...? 😂😂 When I watch them while they're chewing and resting, they quickly grab it and run away scared I'll take it—it's so funny 😂😂 I love how much they enjoy it ❤️

reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content: 오래 먹어서 좋아요 ㅋㅋㅋ 양손으로 꼭 잡고 먹는게 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 하나 주면 그래도 꽤 오래 먹는 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: I love that it lasts a long time lol They hold it with both paws and chew on it, it's so cute 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 When I give them one, they seem to chew on it for quite a while.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
개껌이 이제 바닥나서 하나 사려고 했는데 할인 중이길래 하나 구매해 봤어요
 확실히 다른 것보다는 오래 먹는 것 같긴 해요~ 다만 얘는 하루 용량이 정해져 있어서 그런지 하루에 여러 맛을 못 주는 게 좀 아쉽네요 ㅠㅠ
저희 강아지는 마누카 꿀이 원픽이었어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ !!
reviews.content_en: We ran out of dog chews and I was going to buy one, but they had a discount so I tried buying this one. It definitely seems to last longer than other products~ The only downside is that there's a set daily amount, so we can't give multiple flavors in one day 😢 Our pup's favorite is the Manuka honey flavor haha!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
말티는 장안좋고
포메는 마지막 급히삼켜서
이런 말린껌은 절대사지않습니다.
근데 평이좋아서 사보았어요
배송받고 지금껏 2번줬는데
배탈없이 설사도 안하고  다른간식에비해 오래먹고 좋아해요
근데 놀러온 고기파 친구강쥐는 안먹더라구요.
reviews.content_en: The Maltese has digestive issues and the Pomeranian rushes to swallow at the end, so I never buy dried chews like this. But the reviews were good so I tried them. I've given them twice since receiving them, and there's been no stomach issues or diarrhea, and my dog enjoys them longer than other snacks. But my friend's meat-loving pup that came over wouldn't eat them.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
▪️울강아지가 너무 좋아하는 롤리츄
▪️이갈이 시기라서 너무 잘 씹어먹어요
▪️오랫동안 먹을 수 있어서 과식방지도 되네요:)
reviews.content_en: ▪️ My pup absolutely loves these Lollychews ▪️ Since they're teething, they chew on it really well ▪️ Since they can chew for a long time, it helps prevent overeating :)

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 외출할때 이거하나주고가면 마음이 놓여요 시간가는줄모르고 뜯고 놀아요 먹는다기보단 장난감이에요 너무좋아요 2번째 재구매합니다
reviews.content_en: When I give them one before going out, I feel at ease. They chew and play without losing track of time. It's more of a toy than a snack for them. I love it! This is my second repurchase.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
강쥐들이  정말 좋아해요~~
주니깐 물고 뛰어갈려는거 기다려 시켰더니...
심통이났네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The pups really love it~~ When I gave it to them and waited for them to run off with it in their mouth... they got stubborn lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 야물딱지게 먹고 있는 모습을 보니 뿌듯하네요..^^ 이 맛에 텅장을 만드는거겠죠...?? 저희 강아지는 이빨도 식욕도 강력해서 엄청 오래는 아니지만 그래도....씹고 뜯는 모습이 이쁘네요
reviews.content_en: Seeing them chew on it so earnestly makes me feel so proud ^^ I guess this is the flavor that makes their wallet empty...?? My pup has strong teeth and a strong appetite so it doesn't last super long, but still... the way they chew and tear at it is so cute.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 저번에 오리지널로 줬는데 좋아해서 이번엔 산양유로 사봤는데 이건 잘 안먹네요ㅠㅠ저희 강아지는 입 작은 소형견이라 큰거 못주는데 이건 크기가 적당해요. 아무리 오래 씹어도 안뜯겨서 다이어트 할때 물고 놀으라고 사줬어요.
reviews.content_en: I gave them the original flavor last time and they liked it, so this time I tried the goat milk flavor but they're not eating it well 😢 My pup is a small breed with a small mouth so I can't give them big ones, but this size is just right. No matter how long they chew, it doesn't tear off, so I got it for them to play with while they're on a diet.
